name: Jao Mais
recipeInstructions:
1. Sprinkle the work surface with flour. Leave the dried mushrooms to soak in lukewarm water.
2. Sift the flour into a bowl. Beat the egg, water, and salt in another bowl until combined. Add to the flour mixture and knead into a pliable dough. Cover with a cloth and let rest for 1 hour.
3. Chop the shrimp and drained mushrooms finely. Mix with ground pork, salt, sugar, pepper, and sake.
4. Shape the dough into a roll about 1-1/4 inches thick. Divide into 8 small balls.
5. Roll out each ball very thinly and dust with flour. Divide the filling among the circles of dough. Wet the edges and fold the circles into crescent shapes, pressing the edges together.
6. Place on an oiled plate and steam for 15 minutes.
7. Mix soy sauce and sesame oil to make dipping sauce.
